user.title: Nurture Grass Schedule
user.description: Enter a postcode to find available maintenance sites.

site.title: Select Site
site.description: Choose the site you want to monitor.

error.no_sites: No maintenance sites were found for that postcode.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Nurture schedule website.

init.title: Nurture Grass Settings
init.description: Configure how often the maintenance schedule is refreshed.

no_activities_found.title: No maintenance activities found
no_activities_found.description: Nurture Grass Schedule could not find any maintenance activities for the configured site. This may indicate a website change or temporary service issue.

website_unavailable.title: Nurture website unavailable
website_unavailable.description: The Nurture Grass Schedule integration could not connect to the Nurture website. This is usually a temporary issue and will be retried automatically.

date_parse_failed.title: Could not read maintenance date
date_parse_failed.description: Nurture Grass Schedule found maintenance activities, but one or more dates could not be read. The Nurture website may have changed its date format.

site_not_found.title: Configured site was not found
site_not_found.description: Nurture Grass Schedule could not find the configured site on the Nurture website. The site may have been renamed, removed, or the stored site ID may no longer be valid.

invalid_configuration.title: Configuration is incomplete
invalid_configuration.description: The Nurture Grass Schedule configuration is missing required information. Remove and re-add the integration if this problem persists.
